name: The Tattooed Man of Statistics
text: When The Tattooed Man of Statistics enters the battlefield, the table tallies every die rolled and coin flipped so far this game (best guess; do not actually keep a log, just argue about it for ten seconds). You draw a card for every fifth roll or flip in that total, rounded however the loudest player insists.
flavorText: Every tattoo is a probability he survived. He is running out of skin.

extras.fourthWall: estimate the game's total rolls/flips by table argument
